calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Declaration And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances - Tentative ruling is adopted. Based on no appearances the parties deemed stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem.

ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Defendants, Fuquiang Shuo and Ben Gen Tang, both individually and jointly DBA Wei Mei Cabinet Company will provide to Plaintiff full and complete responses without objection to Plaintiff's First Set of Post judgment Interrogatories and Plaintiffs Post Judgment Demand for Production of Documents and Tangible Things In Accordance with Certain Provisions of Labor Code Section 98.2 no later than the close of business on February 14, 2012.
(2) Defendants, Fuquiang Shuo and Ben Gen Tang, shall either individually or jointly pay to Plaintiff the sum of $640.00 as sanctions. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. Paul Renne Judge Pro Tem, not reported. - 302/JPT
